title: Historical PM Work Identity FK Activation
historical_note: This packet records one bounded PM identity foreign-key-activation slice from before the canonical repo boundary moved to `C:/APEX Platform/apex-power-ops-platform` on 2026-05-07. It remains packet-history provenance, not a live execution instruction for current repo operations.

objective: Activate the six deferred PM/work foreign-key constraints from work.work_packages, work.assignments, work.execution_issues, and work.progress_snapshots into the validated and populated identity schema, verify enforcement and regression safety, and produce constraint-activation evidence without modifying table structures beyond those six constraints or implementing runtime code.
required_inputs: Existing packet-010a model tests, packet-010b API tests, and packet-011f write-surface tests
constrained_outputs: A bounded FK-activation handoff note under c:/APEX Platform/apex-power-ops-platform/ops/agents/handoffs/
Only the six identity foreign-key constraints added to work.work_packages, work.assignments, work.execution_issues, and work.progress_snapshots
Constraint-enforcement and regression evidence after activation
No runtime-code implementation and no unrelated PM/work schema changes
validation_steps: Confirm only the six deferred identity foreign-key constraints on work.work_packages.assigned_crew_id, work.assignments.employee_id, work.assignments.crew_id, work.execution_issues.reported_by, work.execution_issues.assigned_to, and work.progress_snapshots.approved_by are activated
Confirm activation succeeds against the currently populated staging data with no orphan failures and with invalid inserts rejected afterward
Confirm packet 012d does not modify PM/work table structures beyond the six FK constraints and does not implement runtime code
Confirm regression evidence is recorded for packet-010a model tests, packet-010b API tests, and packet-011f project write-path tests after activation
sql_permission_note: Packet 012d authorizes only bounded ALTER TABLE statements to add the six identity foreign-key constraints on work.work_packages, work.assignments, work.execution_issues, and work.progress_snapshots plus validation queries/tests. It does not authorize unrelated schema changes or runtime implementation.
